description: §55.11 — a COMPOUND-CHILD cell whose cross-field validator references itself via member-access (`<a eq(@signup.a)>`) is the degenerate 1-cycle self-reference. This fires E-VALIDATOR-CIRCULAR-DEP as a fatal error. Regression guard for D-FORM-3: the compound member-access self-form previously compiled clean because compound children have no standalone reactive DG node and `@signup.a` resolves to the qualified key `signup.a` the global edge builder could not reach.
rationale: §55.11: validator predicate args form a DAG; a self-reference is a forbidden degenerate 1-cycle. Keying the compound child by its qualified path (`signup.a`) makes the ref `@signup.a` resolve to the cell's own key, so the self-reference is detected. E-VALIDATOR-CIRCULAR-DEP is fatal (§34).
